title: olearia asterotricha subsp. lobata
intro: Olearia asterotricha subsp. lobata, also known as the dwarf tree daisy or mountain daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Olearia asterotricha subsp. lobata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
